parts.text: Our phone terminals show error lights or won’t register.
Calls are dropping or audio is poor.
Call forwarding and hunt group settings aren’t working.
Voicemail isn’t picking up or forwarding messages.
None of our phones are working—calls aren’t going through.
We need help setting up hunt groups and auto attendant for our business lines.
Our phone system isn’t ringing for incoming calls. Can you check if there’s an outage?
We’re having trouble with call forwarding and voicemail. Customers can’t leave messages.
are down—we can’t make or receive calls, and this is affecting our operations.
